state_space: Plasma pressure p, magnetic field B, fluid velocity v
perturbation_operator: Kink modes, tearing modes, ballooning instabilities, neoclassical tearing
stability_condition: Safety factor q > 1; energy principle δW > 0 for all displacements
failure_mode: Major disruption, thermal quench, magnetic reconnection, loss of confinement
observable_metrics: Beta (ratio of plasma pressure to magnetic pressure)
timescale_regime: Microseconds (Alfvén time) to seconds (resistive diffusion time)
non_geometric_elements: Topological reconnection of magnetic field lines
notes: Confinement requires continuous external magnetic flux maintenance against intrinsic fluid instabilities.
